mapper.select: SELECT * FROM xm_project_person_study_record WHERE is_delete = 0 and person_id = #{personId} and project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT * FROM xm_student_subscribe_exam WHERE is_delete = 0 and person_id = #{personId} and project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT * from xm_answer_report WHERE person_id = #{personId} and project_id = #{projectId} and is_delete = 0 and type=#{examType} and course_id is null ORDER BY create_time desc
SELECT * FROM xm_answer_report where person_id=#{personId} and project_id= #{projectId} and type=2 and is_delete = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

select round( (select count(DISTINCT person_id) from xm_answer_report where score < #{score} and type = 2 and is_delete = 0 and course_id is null and project_id = #{projectId}) / (select count(DISTINCT person_id) from xm_answer_report where project_id = #{projectId} and type = 2 and is_delete = 0 and course_id is null) * 100 , 2)
select avg(score) from xm_answer_report where project_id = #{projectId} and type = 2
select id,submit_time from xm_answer_report where type = 4 and is_delete = 0 and person_id = #{personId} and project_id = #{projectId} order by submit_time desc
